description: Salmaan Jaffery discusses the transformative potential of blockchain technology in financial services during a talk at the Dubai International Financial Center. He highlights the DIFC's commitment to innovation and economic growth through its Future Finance Strategy, which aims to digitize financial services and foster new business opportunities.
topic_summary: In this session, Salmaan Jaffery outlines the DIFC's strategy for integrating blockchain into financial services, emphasizing its role in economic diversification and innovation in Dubai. He shares insights on the DIFC Innovation Hub and the importance of collaboration with tech firms and industry leaders [t=97:08].
